docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KANDOHLA, TANYIA JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, MARIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANDOHLA, TANYIA JACQUELINE
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT FINDS IT HAS NO JURISDICTION ON THIS MATTER AS PER CCP 116.370. BOTH PARTIES AGREE THAT MARIN COUNTY IS THE APPROPRIATE VENUE.
SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD, MARIANA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-21-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, MARIANA

REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON DEC 26, 2025. SMALL CLAIMS ENDORSED FILED COPY OF ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) SC-105A TO TANYIA JACQUELINE KANDOHLA RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANDOHLA, TANYIA JACQUELINE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TANYIA JACQUELINE KANDOHLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIANA MCDONALD IS PRESENT. THE COURT ADDRESSES THE VENUE CHALLENGE, AND FINDS THAT IT HAS NO JURISDICTION ON THIS MATTER AS PER CCP 116.370. BOTH PARTIES AGREE THAT MARIN COUNTY IS THE APPROPRIATE VENUE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: BRADEN C. WOODS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
